notes: GeoClaw final-frame raw wet flags include sub-0.15 m numerical films that the Milestone 18 focused geometry diagnostics already exclude with the wet-depth threshold.
The dual-solver wet-mask threshold now scores material wetness from depth using the same 0.15 m floor used for velocity and Froude comparison masks.
This is a validation semantics fix only; it does not promote the constriction lane because field, slope, and probe errors still exceed thresholds.
